story-0008-0001.summary: Extracted writeFile/readFile to CopyHelpers, removing 20 duplicate implementations across 14 assemblers. Net reduction of 117 lines.

story-0008-0002.summary: Extracted listMdFilesSorted, deleteQuietly, hasAllMandatorySections into CopyHelpers. 15 new tests.

story-0008-0003.summary: Created JsonHelpers with RFC 8259 escapeJson() and indent(). 53 unit tests. All 2020 tests pass.

story-0008-0004.summary: Unified 3 local buildContext() variants into canonical ContextBuilder.buildContext() with Python-style boolean conversion. Net reduction of 101 lines.

story-0008-0005.summary: Extracted shared AssemblerResult record, eliminating 3 duplicate inner records. 14 new tests. All 2034 tests pass.

story-0008-0006.summary: Replaced all 17 return null with Optional<T> across 9 source files. Zero nullable returns remaining.

story-0008-0007.summary: Replaced all 3 System.err.println with structured warning propagation via AssemblerResult.

story-0008-0008.summary: Replaced ~70 string concatenations with .formatted() across 21 files. All 2070 tests pass.

story-0008-0009.summary: Replaced 5 magic numbers/strings with named constants (DagColor enum, capacity constants, MILLIS_PER_MINUTE).

story-0008-0010.summary: Replaced 4 boolean flags with enums (HookPresence, DisplayMode, ConfirmDefault). 2078 tests pass.

story-0008-0011.summary: Created 4 parameter object records (ProjectSummary, SkillRenderContext, ConditionalCopyContext, PipelineContext), refactored 7 methods to ≤4 params.

story-0008-0012.summary: Added 6 convenience accessors to ProjectConfig to eliminate train wrecks. 13 new tests.

story-0008-0013.summary: Split CicdAssembler (457→209 lines) into 5 SRP sub-assemblers + coordinator. 26 new tests.

story-0008-0014.summary: Split GithubInstructionsAssembler (419→176) and RulesAssembler (396→147) into 7 SRP classes. 36 new tests.

story-0008-0015.summary: Split SettingsAssembler (439→213) and ReadmeTables (429→124) into 8 SRP classes. 2249 tests pass.

story-0008-0016.summary: Split 16 classes above 250 lines into 33 focused classes (17 new helpers). No class exceeds 250 lines.

story-0008-0017.summary: Decomposed 6 methods exceeding 25 lines across 5 files. All methods now ≤25 lines.

story-0008-0018.summary: Decomposed 44+ methods above 25 lines across 39 files. Codebase fully compliant with method size limits.

story-0008-0019.summary: Extracted Jackson from CheckpointEngine via Port/Adapter pattern. Created CheckpointPersistence interface + JacksonCheckpointPersistence adapter.

story-0008-0020.summary: Extracted I/O from VersionResolver via Port/Adapter. Created VersionDirectoryProvider interface + FileSystemVersionProvider adapter.

story-0008-0021.summary: Added SafeConstructor to all 3 YAML parsing locations. Zero unsafe new Yaml() remaining.

story-0008-0022.summary: Added two-constructor pattern to GithubMcpAssembler. 23/23 assemblers now consistent. 5 new tests.

story-0008-0023.summary: Renamed 1385 test methods across 137 files to [method]_[scenario]_[expected] convention.

story-0008-0024.summary: Replaced 40+ weak assertions across 22 test files with stronger context-specific checks.

story-0008-0025.summary: Split 10 largest test files into 33 focused test classes + 4 fixtures. All test files ≤250 lines.

story-0008-0026.summary: Moved 2 test-only classes to src/test, removed unused method overload, removed dead code.

story-0008-0027.summary: Consolidated exception package. Moved ResourceNotFoundException and GenerationCancelledException to exception/ package.

story-0008-0028.summary: Applied 5 security hardening fixes: path traversal, symlink NOFOLLOW, error sanitization, filename sanitization, temp dir POSIX 700.

story-0008-0029.summary: Fixed qualified names, extracted SkillGroupRegistry, compacted StackMapping. 17 new tests.

story-0008-0030.summary: Created ADR-0001 documenting 4 intentional architectural deviations. Documentation-only change.
